heading: Number of authorized commissioned officers
label: 3005 Number of authorized commissioned officers
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to repeal by .section 853a of this titlePub. L. 107–372

Amendments2020— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section related to number of authorized commissioned officers effective .Pub. L. 116–259Oct. 1, 20092008— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “There are authorized to be on the lineal list of the commissioned corps of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration—Pub. L. 110–386“(1) 270 officers for fiscal year 2003;“(2) 285 officers for fiscal year 2004; and“(3) 299 officers for fiscal year 2005.”
amendments: Amendments2020— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section related to number of authorized commissioned officers effective .Pub. L. 116–259Oct. 1, 20092008— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “There are authorized to be on the lineal list of the commissioned corps of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration—Pub. L. 110–386“(1) 270 officers for fiscal year 2003;“(2) 285 officers for fiscal year 2004; and“(3) 299 officers for fiscal year 2005.”

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The total number of authorized commissioned officers on the lineal list of the commissioned officer corps of the Administration shall not exceed 500.

children.heading: Positions of importance and responsibility
children.label: b Positions of importance and responsibility

children.text: may not be counted in determining the total number of authorized officers on the lineal list under this section; and
may not count against such number.
